_meta.purpose: 知识图谱·BPS 面板/展示维度节点/边（doc 16 面板速查 + doc 13 显示映射 + doc 14 接口规范）。脚本只排版。

nodes.desc_zh: 单贷款止赎详情主页，容纳 Timeline、Hold、Summary、Loss Mitigation、Bankruptcy 五大子面板；数据来自 bpms 5 张 sync 表。
nodes.desc_en: Single-loan foreclosure detail page hosting the Timeline, Hold, Summary, Loss Mitigation and Bankruptcy sub-panels; fed by the 5 bpms sync tables.

nodes.desc_zh: 显示 FCL 汇总状态：status、bid/sale amount、Type(judicial)、Firm、SMS Days/Days in FCL、Current Step、Last Step；喂入字段族 summary_*，源表 sync_loan_foreclosure。
nodes.desc_en: Shows FCL summary status: status, bid/sale amount, Type, Firm, SMS/Days in FCL, Current Step, Last Step; fed by summary_* family from sync_loan_foreclosure.

nodes.desc_zh: 按里程碑展示止赎关键日期（NOI、Referral、First Legal、Service、Judgement、Sale、Completed 等）；喂入字段族 timeline_*（19 字段），源表 sync_loan_foreclosure。
nodes.desc_en: Displays key foreclosure milestone dates (NOI, Referral, First Legal, Service, Judgement, Sale, Completed); fed by timeline_* (19 fields) from sync_loan_foreclosure.

nodes.desc_zh: 展示止赎暂停历史（Description/Start/End Date）；BPS 每日追加变更行保存完整历史，源表 sync_loan_foreclosure_hold（15 列），来自 Newrez 3 个 Hold 槽位。
nodes.desc_en: Shows foreclosure hold history (Description/Start/End Date); BPS appends daily changes for full history. Source: sync_loan_foreclosure_hold (15 cols) from 3 Newrez hold slots.

nodes.desc_zh: 展示 LM 周期历史：Deal/Program/Status/Final Disposition（ETL 解码）、Cycle Opened/Closed、Denial Reason；源表 sync_loan_foreclosure_loss_mitigation（22 列），来自 portnewrezlm。
nodes.desc_en: Shows LM cycle history: Deal/Program/Status/Final Disposition (ETL-decoded), Cycle Opened/Closed dates, Denial Reason; source sync_loan_foreclosure_loss_mitigation (22 cols) from portnewrezlm.

nodes.desc_zh: 展示破产记录：Status/Legal Status/Chapter/MFR/POC 等；源表 sync_loan_foreclosure_bankruptcy（22 列），来自 portnewrezbk + portnewrezgeneral(legal_status)；无记录显示 No Rows。
nodes.desc_en: Shows bankruptcy records: Status/Legal Status/Chapter/MFR/POC; source sync_loan_foreclosure_bankruptcy (22 cols) from portnewrezbk + portnewrezgeneral; empty shows No Rows.

nodes.desc_zh: 展示竞拍审批信息（bid_approval_* 共 4 字段）；源表 sync_loan_foreclosure，来自 Newrez 竞价字段 fcbidamount/fcapprbidprice。
nodes.desc_en: Shows bid approval info (bid_approval_* family, 4 fields); fed from sync_loan_foreclosure using Newrez bid fields fcbidamount/fcapprbidprice.

nodes.desc_zh: 跨贷款聚合概览页（/agg-summary），含 Stage Tab 与 Time Line Tab；源表 sync_fcl_stage_info（57 列），仅含活跃 FCL（activefcflag=1 AND fcremovaldate IS NULL）。
nodes.desc_en: Cross-loan aggregate overview (/agg-summary) with Stage Tab and Time Line Tab; source sync_fcl_stage_info (57 cols), active FCL only.

nodes.desc_zh: 按瀑布优先级阶段（SALE/JUDGEMENT/…/DEMAND）分组贷款，展示 Days in Stage/LM/Hold、Days to Sale/Judgement；喂入 stage 与 {stage}_*_days 字段，源表 sync_fcl_stage_info。
nodes.desc_en: Groups loans by waterfall stage (SALE/JUDGEMENT/.../DEMAND), showing Days in Stage/LM/Hold and Days to Sale/Judgement; fed by stage and {stage}_*_days fields in sync_fcl_stage_info.

nodes.label_zh: 聚合概览 Time Line Tab
nodes.desc_zh: 按贷款展示 7 段里程碑日期列（NOI 1/Referral 2/First Legal 3/Service 4/Publication 5/Judgement 6/Sale 7）；喂入 *_start_date 字段，源表 sync_fcl_stage_info。
nodes.desc_en: Per-loan 7 milestone date columns (NOI/Referral/First Legal/Service/Publication/Judgement/Sale); fed by *_start_date fields in sync_fcl_stage_info.

nodes.desc_zh: FCL 汇总状态字段组（16 个），源表 sync_loan_foreclosure，源自 portnewrezfc。
nodes.desc_en: FCL summary status field group (16), in sync_loan_foreclosure from portnewrezfc.

nodes.desc_zh: FCL 时间线关键日期字段组（19 个），源表 sync_loan_foreclosure，源自 portnewrezfc。
nodes.desc_en: FCL milestone date field group (19), in sync_loan_foreclosure from portnewrezfc.

nodes.desc_zh: 止赎暂停记录字段（Description/Start/End），源表 sync_loan_foreclosure_hold，源自 Newrez fchold1/2/3 槽位。
nodes.desc_en: Foreclosure hold record fields (Description/Start/End), in sync_loan_foreclosure_hold from Newrez fchold1/2/3 slots.

nodes.desc_zh: 瀑布优先级阶段及天数统计字段（stage / {stage}_stage_days / *_start_date），源表 sync_fcl_stage_info。
nodes.desc_en: Waterfall stage + day-count fields (stage / {stage}_stage_days / *_start_date), in sync_fcl_stage_info.

nodes.desc_zh: 竞拍审批信息字段组（4 个），源表 sync_loan_foreclosure，源自 portnewrezfc 竞价字段。
nodes.desc_en: Bid approval info field group (4), in sync_loan_foreclosure from portnewrezfc bid fields.
